# RSI>70 Continuation ETH 4H — Generalization Test

**Data**: Binance USDM `ETH/USDT:USDT` 4H  |  **Range**: 2020-04-08 → 2026-04-24  |  **Bars**: 13240
**Strategy**: enter LONG on RSI(14) cross above 70, exit on cross back below 70. Long-only, no SL/TP.
**Costs**: fee 0.040%/side, slippage 0.050%/side → 0.18% round-trip drag, notional $10,000

## Generalization Verdict: **YES**
